auth.signInPrompt: Sign in with your administrator Google account to continue.
auth.accessDeniedBody: Your account is signed in, but is not on the administrator list. Ask the owner to add you in the Firebase console.
auth.bootstrapTitle: No admin yet — bootstrap as the first owner?
auth.bootstrapBody: No administrator has been set up for this project. Click below to make your account the owner. You can add more admins from Settings afterwards.

dashboard.heading: Dashboard
dashboard.logPaymentDescription: Pick a household, then a family, and record a varisankya.
dashboard.noFamilies: No active families in this household.

households.heading: Members
households.empty: No members yet. Add one to get started.
households.addDescription: Create a new top-level member. Each member contains one or more families.
households.deleteBody: This removes the member from the list. Families, payments, and expenses are kept in the database but will no longer appear. Type the member name to confirm.

householdDetail.noFamilies: No families yet. Add one above.
householdDetail.noMatchingFamilies: No families match the current filters.
householdDetail.noHouseholdExpenses: No household-scoped chelavakal recorded for this month.

householdTable.empty: No members yet. Use “Add member” to create one.

families.addDescription: Add a new family under this household. Each family has its own members and varisankya history.
families.editDescription: Change the family's name or monthly sambawava target.
families.removeBody: This family will be removed from the active list. Varisankya history will be fully preserved.
families.targetHelper: Defaults to the global setting. You can override per family.

payments.recordDescription: Add a varisankya to {name}'s running total for the selected month.
payments.noPayments: No varisankya recorded for the selected period.
payments.deleteBody: This permanently removes the varisankya. Money on hand will decrease by the same amount.

householdMembers.title: Manage members
householdMembers.invalidCount: Member count must match the number of names
householdMembers.dialogDescription: Add, rename, or remove the family members tracked under {name}.

expenses.heading: Chelavakal
expenses.addDescription: Record a new chelavakal. Choose household-linked or mosque-wide.
expenses.confirmDelete: Delete this chelavakal? This cannot be undone.
expenses.allTimeNote: All-time totals across every recorded chelavakal.
expenses.withdrawBody: This records the withdrawal and reduces money on hand by the amount. There is no undo.

recurring.sectionDescription: Templates that repeat each month. Trigger them per month from this list.
recurring.addDescription: Create a monthly-recurring mosque chelavakal template (salary, maintenance, or other).
recurring.withdrawConfirmBody: You are about to withdraw {name} ({amount}). This will reduce money on hand by that amount and cannot be undone.
recurring.warningOverBudget: Recurring chelavakal for this month ({total}) exceed expected sambawava ({expected}).

recurring.heading: Recurring chelavakal
recurring.addDescription: Create a monthly-recurring chelavakal template. You trigger it manually each month.
recurring.monthStatus: Status reflects chelavakal added for the selected month.
recurring.confirmArchive: Archive this template? Previously generated chelavakal stay intact.
recurring.withdrawConfirmBody: You are about to withdraw {name} ({amount}). This will reduce money on hand by that amount and cannot be undone.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.empty: No chelavakal scheduled or recorded for this month.

shortfall.suggestion: Consider deferring or reducing non-essential chelavakal this month.

settings.heading: Settings
settings.openingBalanceHelper: Changing this shifts money on hand by the same amount.
settings.warningBody: Money on hand will shift by {delta}. This is a one-time seed adjustment; future changes here also shift money on hand.
settings.languageDescription: Choose the language for the dashboard. Changes apply immediately.

adminManagement.title: Admins
adminManagement.body: Admins can record varisankya, manage families, and add or remove other admins. Owner is a marker role; both owner and admin have the same UI permissions.
adminManagement.removeBody: This will revoke admin access for {email}. They will need to be re-invited to use the dashboard.
adminManagement.removeConfirmLabel: Type the admin's email to confirm
adminManagement.promoteBody: Enter the Firebase Authentication UID of the person you want to grant access. They must have already signed in to the app at least once so their UID exists in Firebase Auth.
adminManagement.fieldUidHelp: The UID is a 28-character string. Ask the user to sign in once and copy the UID from their Account info, or find it in the Firebase Console under Authentication.

summary.moneyOnHandHelper: Opening balance + all varisankya − all withdrawn chelavakal (all time).
